title: tetragonolobus maritimus var. siliquosus
intro: Tetragonolobus maritimus var. siliquosus, also known as the horse bean or four-angled bean, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetragonolobus maritimus var. siliquosus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as a natural diuretic. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including urinary tract infections and digestive issues.
